name: @angelcare/desktop
description: Production-hardened ANGELCARE Desktop runtime with governed WhatsApp Web, business context, secure diagnostics, controlled updates and release governance.
author: ANGELCARE

scripts.verify: node scripts/verify-mega-zip-1.mjs && node scripts/verify-mega-zip-2.mjs && node scripts/verify-mega-zip-3.mjs && node scripts/verify-mega-zip-4.mjs && node scripts/verify-mega-zip-5.mjs
scripts.package:mac:x64: npm run verify && node scripts/build-macos-dmg.mjs x64
scripts.package:mac:arm64: npm run verify && node scripts/build-macos-dmg.mjs arm64
scripts.make:mac:x64: npm run verify && node scripts/build-macos-dmg.mjs x64
scripts.make:mac:arm64: npm run verify && node scripts/build-macos-dmg.mjs arm64
scripts.make:win:x64: npm run verify && node scripts/build-windows-installer.mjs x64
